mnemonics: T.R.R. Manages E-Waste: Tata, Rajagopalan, and McGraw-Hill's 3-step plan for the 5th major environmental issue.
keyPoints: The textbook by Tata McGraw-Hill authored by R. Rajagopalan is a key resource.
It covers critical aspects of e-waste management including generation, handling, and recycling.
The text addresses the environmental and health impacts of improper e-waste disposal.
commonMistakes: Confusing the publisher (Tata McGraw-Hill) with the author (R. Rajagopalan).
Focusing only on the definition of e-waste and neglecting the management strategies and regulations discussed in the text.
Overlooking the specific case studies or data presented by Rajagopalan that illustrate the scale of the problem.
